nextOperationalGates: Provide OCR or reviewer-owned visual/text notes for the 85 representative pages, or explicitly record documented future-loss decisions where a source is not worth deeper OCR.
Only route validation-ready rows into semantic merge preview.
Run public grounding and originality review before module distillation.
Keep Course 5 source-folder deletion blocked until accepted replacement evidence or documented future-loss acceptance exists for every follow-up row.
completionRule: This Wave 5 pack is complete when the 29 remaining PDF OCR or future-loss decision source rows and their 85 representative page samples are isolated with reviewer-owned input requirements, validation routes, and release/deletion gates closed.
boundary: Course 5 Wave 5 PDF execution pack is private reviewer-facing education operations material. It isolates the 29 remaining PDF OCR or future-loss decision blockers and their representative page samples for future OCR, reviewer-owned visual/text input, documented future-loss decisions, semantic merge preview, public grounding, and deletion-readiness recomputation. It does not perform OCR, generate reviewer conclusions, accept machine drafts as human review, merge content into learner-facing modules, delete files, approve source-folder deletion, approve learner-facing release, copy private source wording, provide stock recommendations, live signals, return promises, broker workflows, automation, real-money guidance, write authorization, or production readiness.
